title: Weapons +
description: Weapons + a mod that adds a lot of weapons, a creative mode tab, achievements and their crafting.
body:
It adds new weapons (Katana, Hammer, Fire Trident, Morgenstern, Double-sided Axe, Broadsword, Quartz Knife, Bat, Halberd, Emerald Sword, Ruby Sword), 2 related Achievements and a tab in creative mode!
You can play minecraft with this mod with pleasure!
By gloww
